summary: Frontend-only iteration 7 testing complete for MULTIPLIKATOR site. All 38 assertions pass (0 failures). Verified: (1) New /telechargements page loads with hero 'Documents, dépliants et visuels MULTIPLIKATOR.'; 3 categories visible in DOM (Brochures & PDFs, Dépliants, Visuels & Réseaux sociaux); all 12 data-testid 'download-dl-*' cards present (dl-brochure-mpk, dl-syllabus-allemand, dl-tarifs-2026, dl-faq-visa, dl-flyer-prep-goethe, dl-flyer-osd, dl-flyer-tourism, dl-flyer-campus, dl-logo-pack, dl-charte-graphique, dl-wallpapers, dl-posters-rentree); each card displays 'Bientôt disponible' (12 occurrences) with no active 'download-btn-*' elements since url='#'. (2) Header COMMUNAUTÉ dropdown contains exactly 6 items including nav-sub-/telechargements which navigates to /telechargements on click. (3) Footer Navigation column contains a 'Téléchargements' link to /telechargements. (4) CTA color inversion verified by className substring inspection: hero-cta-formations (Home), link-to-examprep (TrainingPlus), contact-whatsapp (Contact), footer-wa-cta (Footer), prep-buy-prep_goethe_a1-int (ExamPrep) ALL contain both 'bg-[#580505]' and 'text-[#C4D2ED]' classes. (5) hero-cta-contact ghost variant correctly uses 'bg-transparent' + 'text-[#C4D2ED]'. (6) /appel-a-investissement displays the 3 CTA buttons (Nous contacter, Email direct, WhatsApp). (7) Regression — /alumnis, /notre-histoire, /campus, /departements/exam-prep, /confidentialite, /conditions-utilisation all return 200 with rendered h1. CSS confirmation: index.css .btn-primary and .btn-cta-framed both set background=#580505 and color=#C4D2ED (inversion applied). Console 401s on /api/auth/me are expected unauthenticated session probes, not bugs.
critical_code_review_comments: Downloads.jsx cleanly conditionalizes between '<a download>' (when url is real) and a disabled Lock badge (when url=='#'). Good UX for upcoming files.
DOWNLOADS data in /lib/data.js is well-structured with id/title/desc/format/size/url — easy to populate real URLs later without page refactor.
Header nav 'Communauté' now has 6 items, still fits within 260px min-width dropdown. No overflow observed.
Footer 'Téléchargements' link placed between Boutique M and Actualités as requested.

All CTA color migrations to bg-[#580505] + text-[#C4D2ED] are consistent across pages; the inversion (was light bg + dark text) is now dark burgundy with periwinkle text — strong contrast (AA-passing for white-ish on dark burgundy).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tailwind arbitrary classes like bg-[#580505] and text-[#C4D2ED] are preserved verbatim in className — verify CTA colors via element.get_attribute('class').includes(...) rather than computed CSS, as JIT may produce different runtime selectors. /telechargements is a static catalog page (no backend calls). The 12 download cards intentionally show no real href until populated. Header dropdown 'Communauté' now has 6 items; hover-then-click pattern works reliably (use page.locator(...).hover() then wait 400ms before clicking sub items).
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Iteration-7 CTA color inversion and Downloads page (with header + footer entry) all verified working.
